name: AlgoTrade
icp: Crypto-savvy retail traders who want AI-powered prediction market edges without coding
moat: OpenClaw local LLM analysis + Kelly sizing + long-tail market selection algorithm

strategy.focus: AI prediction edge on long-tail Polymarket markets (<$100K volume, 7-30 day resolution)
strategy.not: Market making / HFT (arb window 2.7s, 73% captured by sub-100ms bots — unwinnable)
strategy.edge: Information quality advantage where LLM analysis speed (500ms-2s) is irrelevant

tech.llm: OpenClaw (local Qwen/DeepSeek via MLX on M1 Max)

agents.Product: Feature roadmap, RaaS packaging, UX for traders
agents.Engineering: CTO — fix tests, paper trading loop, live execution
